heading: Omitted
label: 310, 311 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 310 and 311, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 310, , , allowed conduct of commercial business over military telegraph and cable lines.act May 26, 1900, ch. 58631 Stat. 206Section 311, , , allowed payment of charges for interconnection between radio-telephone facilities of Alaska Communication System and commercial facilities to be made out of receipts of the Alaska Communication System.act May 23, 1941, ch. 130, § 155 Stat. 190
amendments: CodificationSections 310 and 311, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 310, , , allowed conduct of commercial business over military telegraph and cable lines.act May 26, 1900, ch. 58631 Stat. 206Section 311, , , allowed payment of charges for interconnection between radio-telephone facilities of Alaska Communication System and commercial facilities to be made out of receipts of the Alaska Communication System.act May 23, 1941, ch. 130, § 155 Stat. 190
